title: Fix: JSON injection vulnerability
original_text: Fixed JSON injection vulnerability in API. Implemented secure JSON parsing with validation. Added JSON schema validation. Implemented JSON sanitization for user input. Added JSON parsing error handling. Result: JSON injection vulnerability fixed.
expected_body_lines: - Implement secure JSON parsing with validation
- Implement JSON sanitization for user input
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(security): fix JSON injection vulnerability"
